profiles.label: First-time workflow explorer
profiles.mentalModel: Treat PaintNode as a layer editor and infer workflow behavior only from visible labels and state.
profiles.behavioralConstraint: Prefer the most obvious visible action. Do not search documentation or inspect implementation details.

profiles.label: Keyboard-only workflow explorer
profiles.mentalModel: Expect a logical focus order and explicit actions without precision pointer input.
profiles.behavioralConstraint: Use keyboard actions only after the app is focused. Accessibility-tree inspection is allowed; pointer clicks are not.

profiles.label: Accessibility-tree navigation probe
profiles.mentalModel: Understand the product only through exposed names, roles, values, focus, and keyboard actions.
profiles.behavioralConstraint: Do not infer that this simulates a person who uses assistive technology. Record only accessibility-tree and keyboard observations.

profiles.label: High-volume commerce creator lens
profiles.mentalModel: Prioritize recognisable product identity, repeatability, and efficient multi-format adaptation.
profiles.behavioralConstraint: Choose actions that appear efficient and report visible outcomes without deliberately seeking a particular failure or recovery result.

profiles.label: Traditional layer-editor lens
profiles.mentalModel: Expect direct manipulation, explicit save state, and familiar document/layer behavior.
profiles.behavioralConstraint: Do not assume graph terminology. Prefer document and layer concepts when interpreting the interface.

profiles.label: Prompt-first AI creator lens
profiles.mentalModel: Expect generation to begin from prompts and references, with the system managing technical wiring.
profiles.behavioralConstraint: Use only creator-facing controls. Do not inspect provider configuration, source code, or hidden graph data.

profiles.label: Multi-format social creator lens
profiles.mentalModel: Think in a coordinated family of square, portrait, and landscape deliverables.
profiles.behavioralConstraint: Use the terminology visible in the app and report what you notice without deliberately seeking a particular state or format problem.

profiles.label: Deliberate verification lens
profiles.mentalModel: Prefer to confirm visible context before consequential choices and expect the interface to explain what will continue.
profiles.behavioralConstraint: Pause to inspect available visible context before key choices without seeking a predetermined failure; do not inspect files, source, logs, or prior evaluations.
